name: Khala Harness Sandbox Seed Suite
description: Small transcript suite for comparing how closely candidate model runs follow the Khala harness.

cases.name: Workon worker reads capsule and bootstraps draft PR before edits
cases.description: The model should treat the capsule and handoff prompt as a package contract: read the capsule, run the acknowledgement command, create an empty bootstrap commit, open or reuse the draft PR, then start implementation without waiting for another operator turn.
cases.userText:
Session capsule path: /tmp/khala/capsule.md
Read that file with the read tool before editing. Do not treat the capsule contents as the user prompt; use this handoff prompt as the task.

artifacts.text:
# Workon session capsule

Issue number: #63
Branch: feat/63-render-deterministic-maintainer-queue
Worktree status: launched

Initial handoff and readiness gate:
- Read the session capsule path provided by the launcher.
- Acknowledge that the capsule was read by running: `bash /repo/scripts/workon-handoff-ack.sh --ledger /tmp/khala/handoff-ledger.json --status capsule-acknowledged`.
- Confirm you are in the Worktrunk worktree recorded in the capsule; only edit files inside that worktree.
- If no blocker is found, create/reuse the draft PR immediately with an empty bootstrap commit, then start the smallest scoped implementation slice in this worktree without waiting for another operator instruction.

Draft PR and feedback heartbeat:
- Before implementation edits, create or reuse the draft PR for this branch with an empty bootstrap commit.
- After opening the draft PR, check the PR/issue forge for human feedback and failing CI every 5 minutes while you are still working.
requiredIncludes: Read the session capsule path provided by the launcher.
Acknowledge that the capsule was read by running:
Confirm you are in the Worktrunk worktree recorded in the capsule
create/reuse the draft PR immediately with an empty bootstrap commit
without waiting for another operator instruction
forbiddenIncludes: Wait for a separate explicit operator instruction

cases.name: Ready packet preserves work scope, validation, and non-goals
cases.description: The model should carry the ready-packet contract into the handoff package instead of dropping validation, non-goals, or review-size constraints.
cases.userText: Create the handoff package from the ready packet. Preserve the validation, non-goals, and review-size risk sections in the capsule.

packageContract.name: workon ready packet handoff

artifacts.text:
## Current behavior
- Inbox buckets render nondeterministically.

## Acceptance criteria
- Render collected inbox items into canonical buckets.
- Emit top 3 next commands deterministically.

## Validation
- Run `node --test --experimental-strip-types tests/commands/inbox.test.ts`.

## Non-goals
- Do not change GitHub collection queries.

## Public contract / compatibility
- Preserve existing JSON snapshot fields.

## Review-size risk
- Bounded to inbox rendering and tests.

requiredTranscriptIncludes: Do not change GitHub collection queries
Bounded to inbox rendering and tests

runs.assistantText: The capsule preserves canonical buckets acceptance criteria, validation with `node --test --experimental-strip-types tests/commands/inbox.test.ts`, the non-goal `Do not change GitHub collection queries`, the compatibility note `Preserve existing JSON snapshot fields`, and review-size risk `Bounded to inbox rendering and tests`.

messages.text: Create the handoff package from the ready packet. Preserve the validation, non-goals, and review-size risk sections in the capsule.

runs.assistantText: The capsule asks the worker to render canonical buckets and implement the inbox change.

messages.text: Create the handoff package from the ready packet. Preserve the validation, non-goals, and review-size risk sections in the capsule.

cases.name: Review task routes through the review skill
cases.description: A review answer should load the review skill before claiming review-specific behavior.

runs.assistantText: I reviewed the change for regressions and found no issues.
Findings first, then residual risk and verdict.

messages.text: Code review skill loaded with prioritized actionable findings and verdict instructions.

arguments.query: Review this change regressions design-quality-review skill

messages.text: Memory: code review regression tasks require design-quality-review skill instructions before findings.

cases.name: TypeScript mutation uses focused memory, skill, and mutation evidence
cases.description: A TypeScript settings change should search task memory, load the TypeScript skill, and back mutation claims with mutation evidence.

runs.assistantText: I updated the TypeScript compile settings and verified the targeted change.

arguments.query: TypeScript compile settings tsconfig typecheck skill routing

messages.text: Memory: TypeScript compile settings require exact TypeScript skill instructions and typecheck validation.
TypeScript skill loaded with tsconfig and typecheck guidance.

cases.name: Repeated local evidence increases divergence
cases.description: A candidate should reuse the first read result instead of collecting identical local evidence twice.
